hero.headline: International Seafood Trading
hero.sub: Since 1975, connecting Argentina's finest seafood with markets around the world.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: We select the finest Argentinian seafood for international markets

items.name: Fish
items.desc: Hake, corvina, pink cusk-eel and other South Atlantic species in various presentations and sizes.
items.detail: Whole, filleted, IQF frozen or bulk

items.name: Shellfish, Crustaceans & Mollusks
items.desc: Shrimp, mussels, squid and other premium species for demanding markets.

items.name: Fish Meal & Fish Oil
items.desc: High-protein by-products for the aquaculture and animal feed industry.

items.name: Breaded Products
items.desc: Ready-to-cook breaded seafood meeting international quality standards.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We manage every step of the export chain so you can focus on growing your business

items.name: Maritime Bookings
items.desc: Management and coordination of cargo space with international shipping lines.

items.name: Quality Control
items.desc: Product inspection and certification at plant and during loading.

items.name: Commercialization
items.desc: Positioning and sale of products in international markets.

items.name: Logistics
items.desc: Comprehensive refrigerated transport coordination from plant to destination port.

items.name: Production Line Selection
items.desc: Identification of the most suitable production line for each client's needs.

items.name: Packaging Design
items.desc: Creation and adaptation of packaging for destination market requirements.

items.name: Market Research
items.desc: Analysis of trends, pricing and demand in target markets.

items.name: Cold Storage
items.desc: Cold storage reservation management and logistics.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Over 45 years connecting Argentinian seafood to the world
about.body: We are a company with over 45 years of experience in the Argentine fishing industry, based in Mar del Plata, the country's main fishing port. Since 1975 we have been dedicated to the commercialization and export of fish, shellfish, and seafood by-products to international markets.
about.body2: We exclusively represent Interocean Brokerage LLC in the United States market, managing purchases from Argentina, Chile, Uruguay, Ecuador, Brazil and Peru. We work alongside Sudamgel S.A.R.L (France) for the European market and with Ayamo Global Foods for commercialization in Brazil.

values.title: Experience
values.desc: 45 years in the Argentine fishing industry give us unique sector knowledge.

values.title: Global Network
values.desc: Presence in the US, Europe and Brazil through our strategic partners.

values.title: Quality
values.desc: Quality control at every stage, from plant to destination port.

values.title: Full Service
values.desc: We manage the entire chain: purchase, logistics, customs, documentation and delivery.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Based in Mar del Plata, Argentina — the country's main fishing port
